mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO oa_leave_balance (user_id, leave_type, year, total_days, used_days, pending_days, transferred_days) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.leaveType}, #{item.year}, #{item.totalDays}, COALESCE(#{item.usedDays}, 0), COALESCE(#{item.pendingDays}, 0), COALESCE(#{item.transferredDays}, 0))
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_days = VALUES(total_days), used_days = COALESCE(VALUES(used_days), used_days), pending_days = COALESCE(VALUES(pending_days), pending_days)
